metadata.description: A curated plugin marketplace for Claude Code containing development tools and productivity plugins specifically designed for FlowAccount developers.

plugins.name: ask-before-code
plugins.description: Encourages clarity before coding to prevent wasted work. Ask 3 questions now, save 3 hours later.

plugins.name: quick-wins
plugins.description: Identifies and guides easy code improvements. Small improvements, big impact.

plugins.name: md-to-skill
plugins.description: Converts markdown files into organized Claude skills with intelligent candidate detection. Stop hook scores new markdown files across 6 signals to suggest high-confidence skill candidates.

plugins.name: feature-sprint
plugins.description: Scope-driven feature development. /sprint for one-shot features. /sprint-loop for long-lived sessions with dynamic agent scaling (spawn on demand, message-driven, idle = free).

plugins.name: dev-tools
plugins.description: AWS, Jenkins, and Git dev tools exposed as MCP tools — ECS management, SSO credentials, Jenkins CI builds, and Git workflow shortcuts.
